scene_labels.label: Jack prepares seriously for his final team project presentation
scene_labels.description: Jack has spent weeks preparing to lead his team's final presentation. He practices every night, checks each slide carefully, and sets two alarms before going to sleep.

scene_labels.label: Jack wakes up late and realizes the alarms failed
scene_labels.description: Jack wakes up to bright sunlight, immediately realizes he is late, jumps out of bed, and discovers that both alarms failed.

scene_labels.label: Jack rushes out and realizes he forgot his wallet and student ID
scene_labels.description: Jack grabs his clothes, laptop, and bag, runs out without breakfast, and then notices at the subway station that he forgot his wallet and student ID.

scene_labels.label: Jack drops his phone and nearly falls on the crowded train
scene_labels.description: On a crowded and slow train, Jack drops his phone under a seat while checking his notes. When the train suddenly moves, he loses his balance and a nearby woman catches his arm.

scene_labels.label: A woman gives Jack a mysterious note
scene_labels.description: The woman hands Jack a folded note. When he opens it, he reads a strange message telling him to stay on the train and get off at the last station.

scene_labels.label: Jack faces a decision after reading the strange message
scene_labels.description: After the woman disappears, Jack feels tense and uncertain. He wonders whether the note is a joke or a warning, and he must decide between trusting the message or getting off early to reach class on time.
